data.title: Japanese Government Signs off on Crypto Brokerages, Stablecoin Reforms
data.description:
The Japanese government has signed off on proposals to reform laws governing crypto brokerages and stablecoins.
The post Japanese Government Signs off on Crypto Brokerages, Stablecoin Reforms appeared first on Cryptonews.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/japanese-government-signs-off-on-crypto-brokerages-stablecoin-reforms/

data.title: Pump.fun Tokens Drop to September 2024 Lows – Is Meme coin Season Over?
data.description:
Following the price fall for prominent memecoins like LIBRA and TRUMP, users have reduced attention given to Pump.fun-generated meme tokens.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/pump-fun-tokens-drop-to-september-2024-lows-is-meme-coin-season-over/

data.title: CZ criticizes short-term greed in crypto, urges focus on ethical, long-term growth
data.description:
Changpeng "CZ" Zhao has criticized the short-term crypto investment culture, in which investors are driven by greed.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/cz-criticizes-short-term-greed-in-crypto/

data.title: Binance bans market maker for misconduct, seizes funds for GPS & SHELL user compensation
data.description:
Crypto exchange Binance banned a market maker for GoPlus Security (GPS) and the project MyShell (SHELL) over gross misconduct.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/binance-bans-market-maker-for-misconduct/

data.title: The Funding: VCs digest Trump’s bitcoin reserve and say what could start ‘an incredible era of innovation for crypto’
data.description:
